title: Bridge Essay: Effects of self-transcendence on neural responses to persuasive messages and health behavior change.
concept: Self-transcendence — mystical experience, cosmic consciousness, awe, numinous in neuroscience.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Self-transcendence — mystical experience, cosmic consciousness, awe, numinous in neuroscience.

**Effects of self-transcendence on neural responses to persuasive messages and health behavior change.** - Proc Natl Acad Sci U S A (2018). DOI: 10.1073/pnas.1805573115. PMID: 30224461. Self-transcendence refers to a shift in mindset from focusing on self-interests to the well-being of others. We offer an integrative neural model of self-transcendence in the context of persuasive messaging by examining the mechanisms of self-transcendence in promoting receptivity to health messages and behavior change. Specifically, we posited that focusing on values and activities that transcend the self can allow people to see that their self-worth is not tied to a specific behavior in questi
